package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_benchmark_missing_allocs_report: Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag benchmarks for allocation-sensitive code that omit b.ReportAllocs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule575NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario575Negative(records []Rule575NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
